Off Calendar Mar-24-2004 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-09-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-09-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Apr-06-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert S. Kennard, Esq. for Plaintiff, WFS Financial, Inc.
Dennis D. Vann, Esq. for Defendant
Mae White, Defendant

Re-assignment from Presiding Judge's Dept. scheduled for court trial for settlemnt on complaint for possession of personal property and for danmages.
Terms of the agreement were put on the record as follows:
Defendant agrees to pay compromise settlement amount of $15,592.02 plus $4.04 per day in interest on or before 3/9/04.
If Defendant pays the amount by the ageed upon date of 3/9/04, title to vehicle will be returned to the Defendant and dismissal with prejudice will be filed.
Case is continued to 4/6/04 in Dept. #212 for CRC 225 dismissal.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Ron Sinclair

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2003 Set For Trial On Feb-09-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
